rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0001
rows.name:
What is taking so long! When
will the target be destroyed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0002
rows.name: Ah, sir... that is[ST:wide ]—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0003
rows.name:
It appears a Trion-type barrier
has been deployed around the target.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0004
rows.name: A Trion-type barrier, you say?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0005
rows.name:
Why would mere Earthlings
possess such technology?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0006
rows.name:
Was that not a technology only
the Qlu system could achieve!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0007
rows.name:
Even those Dolls... Why would an undeveloped
primitive race possess such things!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0008
rows.name:
Though their civilization level is low, perhaps
Earthlings really were descendants of the Progenitor...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0009
rows.name:
I won't believe such myths... No,
I refuse to believe such nonsense![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0010
rows.name:
They are the cancer cells of the universe!
To call them a safety device or anything of the sort...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0011
rows.name: Number 4 secondary turret silenced![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0012
rows.name: 3rd cluster turret group heavily damaged![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0013
rows.name: The enemy unit's offensive is intensifying![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0014
rows.name:
At this rate, we cannot land any
effective blows on the target![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0015
rows.name: What about the interceptor unit!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0016
rows.name:
They are being held back by another enemy unit
and cannot come to guard this ship![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0017
rows.name:
How can savages of that level fight
like this!? Could it truly be!?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0017_02
rows.name: [ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0018
rows.name: Bring the Vita around! I will go out myself![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0019
rows.name:
Supreme Commander, the Vita
belongs to the Great One![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0020
rows.name:
Even your body will not last,
Supreme Commander Luxaar![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0021
rows.name: I, too, am kin of the Great One![ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs12070100_MSG0022
rows.name:
I will show you that I can use
it. Nay, I must use it![ST:wait ]
